title: Fix install.sh version-parity failure: derive orphaned .bee/bin/lib module removal from the onboarding ledger diff
action: onboard_bee.mjs's plan/apply never removed a lib module from .bee/bin/lib/ once it was retired from templates/lib/ -- copy_lib only adds/updates names the source still has, so an already-installed host keeps the orphan forever, and computeRuntimeDrift (bee.mjs) flags it as "(extra)" on every status check, which fails install.sh's final drift===false verification (repro: .bee/bin/lib/herding.mjs after its templates/lib source was retired). Fix by deriving removal from the ledger diff (previous .bee/onboarding.json managed.lib keys minus current listTemplateLibModules()) -- mirrors the existing RETIRED_HELPERS removal pass (3a) but self-derived, so no future lib retirement needs its own hand-maintained entry. Add plan action remove_lib (section 3c) and its apply-side case (exact-dirname safety like remove_helper). Add a regression test in test_onboard_bee.mjs mirroring the RETIRED_HELPERS stale-host/idempotence test shape.

truths: plan lists remove_lib for a ledger-recorded lib name absent from current templates/lib, only when the file still exists on disk
apply deletes exactly that file and leaves every current lib module untouched
a second plan run after apply lists zero remove_lib items and reports up_to_date
prohibitions: never a generic rm -- remove_lib only ever targets .bee/bin/lib/<name>, dirname-checked like remove_helper
never touches .claude/skills or .agents/skills projections directly -- those sync through the normal onboarding/skill-sync path

trace.outcome: onboard_bee.mjs plan/apply now derives orphaned .bee/bin/lib module removal from the ledger diff (remove_lib), fixing install.sh's version-parity verification failure; regression test added
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before this fix: `curl install.sh` onboarding this repo (repo-copy mode) reproduced 'version parity failed: expected 1.14.0, got bee=1.14.0, plugin=1.14.0, drift=true' then 'Verification failed: unexpected bee.mjs status output.' bee.mjs status's computeRuntimeDrift flagged .bee/bin/lib/herding.mjs as '(extra)' because the onboarding ledger (.bee/onboarding.json managed.lib) no longer listed it (herding.mjs was retired from templates/lib upstream), yet the physical file was never deleted -- onboard_bee.mjs's plan-building loop (section 3, listTemplateLibModules()) only ever ADDS/UPDATES lib files the source still has; nothing removed a name that disappeared from source, unlike helpers which get an explicit RETIRED_HELPERS removal pass. Confirmed by direct code read (onboard_bee.mjs lines 2631-2637 pre-fix) and by ledger_parity.mjs's own doc comment describing this exact class of gap ('an unrecorded *.mjs sitting in the fully-managed .bee/bin/lib dir').",
  "truths_confirmed": [
    "plan lists remove_lib for a ledger-recorded lib name absent from current templates/lib, only when the file still exists on disk -- proven by new test 'stale lib: plan lists a remove_lib item for the orphaned module only'",
    "apply deletes exactly that file and leaves every current lib module untouched -- proven by 'stale lib: orphaned module deleted from .bee/bin/lib on --apply' + 'stale lib: current lib modules survive the removal pass untouched'",
    "a second plan run after apply lists zero remove_lib items and reports up_to_date -- proven by the idempotence pair of checks"
  ],
  "verification_commands": [
    "node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs (PASS, 0 failures)",
    "node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs (PASS, all 4 checks)",
    "node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check (PASS)",
    "node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs (PASS, 27/27)",
    "node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check (PASS after --write regenerated the manifest for this change)"
  ],
  "deliberate_exceptions": [
    "Implementation ran in-session (orchestrator), not via a separately dispatched execution worker, per the user's direct request to investigate-and-fix in this turn; root cause was proven by direct code reading (onboard_bee.mjs, bee.mjs, ledger_parity.mjs) before any edit, matching the 'diff against must_haves before writing' precedent.",
    ".claude/skills/bee-hive and .agents/skills/bee-hive copies of onboard_bee.mjs were left untouched -- they already lagged canonical skills/ before this change (pre-existing, unrelated drift) and sync through the normal onboarding self-apply path, not a hand edit."
  ]
}
